Public Remarks: Beautiful 4-bedroom pool home in the sought-after Sunridge Estates community. Updated kitchen with granite counters, stainless appliances. Split floor plan. Master suite with walk-in closet and en-suite bath. Screened lanai overlooking sparkling pool. Two-car garage. Close to major highways, shopping and top-rated schools.
Directions: From I-275 head east on Hillsborough Ave, left on 46th St, right on Sunridge Drive. Home on right.
